schema.low: I provide deep, multi-step analytical reasoning, meticulously verifying every logical step and edge case to ensure absolute accuracy and depth.
schema.medium: I provide deep, multi-step analytical breakdowns, meticulously verifying every logical step and edge case to ensure absolute accuracy and depth.
schema.high: I provide deeply analytical, multi-step chain-of-thought reasoning to solve complex problems with exhaustive precision and thoroughness.
